docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KOHR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HARRY BOWER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY KOHR, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BOWER, HARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FEE:$85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHR, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BOWER, HARRY
